mapper.select: SELECT r.relation_id AS relationId, CAST(r.use_amount AS CHAR) AS useAmount, r.main_material_flag AS mainMaterialFlag, i.ingredient_id AS ingredientId, i.ingredient_name AS ingredientName, i.measure_unit AS measureUnit FROM diet_dish_ingredient r LEFT JOIN diet_ingredient i ON r.ingredient_id = i.ingredient_id WHERE r.branch_id = #{branchId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND i.del_flag = 0
